name: x0drop
description: Desktop client for x0.at uploads with history and retention tracking.
author: Macxzew

scripts.build-win: npm run build && npx @electron/packager . "x0 Desk" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite && if [ -d "release/x0 Desk-win32-x64" ]; then cd "release/x0 Desk-win32-x64" && rm -f chrome_100_percent.pak chrome_200_percent.pak d3dcompiler_47.dll libEGL.dll libGLESv2.dll LICENSE LICENSES.chromium.html snapshot_blob.bin version version.dll vk_swiftshader.dll vk_swiftshader_icd.json vulkan-1.dll; else echo "Folder does not exist"; fi
scripts.build-mac: npm run build && npx @electron/packager . "x0 Desk" --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite && if [ -d "release/x0 Desk-darwin-x64" ]; then cd "release/x0 Desk-darwin-x64" && rm -f LICENSE LICENSES.chromium.html version; else echo "Folder does not exist"; fi
scripts.build-lin: npm run build && npx @electron/packager . "x0 Desk" --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite && if [ -d "release/x0 Desk-linux-x64" ]; then cd "release/x0 Desk-linux-x64" && rm -f LICENSE LICENSES.chromium.html version; else echo "Folder does not exist"; fi
scripts.build-all: npm run build-win && npm run build-lin && npm run build-mac
scripts.clean: rimraf dist dist-electron release package-lock.json node_modules
